notes: GitHub for Slack notifications (PRs, releases, Dependabot alerts). Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. PR-merged card = header (Pull request merged) + a summary section with a linked PR title + section(fields) for Repository/Merged by/Branch/Reviews + a context footer with commit/diff stats. Also includes a critical Dependabot security-alert card and a release-published card. Fits dev/DevOps/security channels.

examples.name: pull_request_merged
examples.when: A PR is merged to a shared repo; posted to a dev/platform channel.

text.text: *<https://github.com/TOYOTA/onetech-platform-core/pull/482|#482 · feat(telemetry): shared OpenTelemetry + Datadog instrumentation module>*  Adds a reusable telemetry module to `platform-core` so downstream services get traces, metrics, and log correlation from a single import.

examples.name: dependabot_critical_alert
examples.when: Dependabot detects a critical CVE in a production dependency; posted to a security/vuln channel.

text.text: *TOYOTA/connected-remote-connect-api* — a *critical* severity vulnerability was detected in a production dependency.
Remote code execution via data binding on JDK 9+ (`class.module.classLoader`). Exploitable on internet-facing Spring MVC endpoints — a customer-facing service is in scope.

elements.text: Dependabot · github.com/TOYOTA · detected 3 min ago · 2 repos affected

examples.name: release_published
examples.when: A signed release/tag is published; posted to a release or deployment channel.

fields.text:
*Includes:*
Multimedia SW · Map tiles · Google POI
